prompt:
---Task---
Extract entities and relationships from the input text in Data to be Processed below.

---Instructions---
1.  **Strict Adherence to Format:** Strictly adhere to all format requirements for entity and relationship lists, including output order, field delimiters, and proper noun handling, as specified in the system prompt.
2.  **Output Content Only:** Output *only* the extracted list of entities and relationships. Do not include any introductory or concluding remarks, explanations, or additional text before or after the list.
3.  **Completion Signal:** Output `<|COMPLETE|>` as the final line after all relevant entities and relationships have been extracted and presented.
4.  **Output Language:** Ensure the output language is English. Proper nouns (e.g., personal names, place names, organization names) must be kept in their original language and not translated.

---Data to be Processed---
<Entity_types>
["Person","Creature","Organization","Location","Event","Concept","Method","Content","Data","Artifact","NaturalObject"]

<Input Text>
```
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Joanna said: "Hey Nate, it's been a minute! I wrapped up my second script, and the feels have been wild. Sometimes I'm so relieved, but other times I just feel anxious about what comes next. It's a mix of excitement and terror, thinking about my work getting noticed and hitting the big screen."
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Nate said: "Hey Joanna! Awesome to hear from you! Congrats on wrapping up a second one! All that hard work and dedication will definitely shine through and get noticed, no doubt. Hope you've been able to take some time to relax after everything!"
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Joanna said: "Thanks Nate! It's been a wild ride. I've been decompressing, but it's hard to switch off. There's always this tug-of-war of hope and doubt."
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Nate said: "It's normal to have doubts, but you've worked hard and put tons of passion into it. Believe in yourself and things will work out. Here, look at this cute pic - walking them always reminds me to enjoy the small stuff!"
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Joanna said: "That pic's adorable! They always look so relaxed outside. What made you choose them as pets?"
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Nate said: "I'm drawn to turtles. They're unique and their slow pace is a nice change from the rush of life. They're also low-maintenance and calming. Check out this moment I snapped!"
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Joanna said: "They look so peaceful! It's amazing how these creatures bring so much calm and joy. Is taking care of them tough?"
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Nate said: "No, not really. Just keep their area clean, feed them properly, and make sure they get enough light. It's actually kind of fun."
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Joanna said: "Sounds great! Having pets must be a wonderful experience."
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Nate said: "Pets definitely bring tons of joy. They are always there for us and they're so cute! Relaxing with them is a great way to chill."
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Joanna said: "I wish I wasn't allergic! I would get two turtles today if I could! I found out recently I'm allergic to cockroaches as well, so who knows if I'll ever get a pet."
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Nate said: "Sorry! Maybe there are other animals you could consider! In the meantime though, I'll be sure to send you pics of my turtles so you can still watch them grow without getting too close."
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Joanna said: "Great idea! I'm already really invested in those little guys!"
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Nate said: "Pets really seem to do that to everyone don't they! So, what about your script now? Any ideas for the next steps?"
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Joanna said: "I've been doing my fair share of research and networking non-stop for it. It's tough, but I'm determined to make it happen."
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Nate said: "Great idea! that should hopefully get some more eyes on it. Keep up the hard work!"
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Joanna said: "Thanks so much, Nate! Your support means a lot. I'll keep working at it and hopefully the next steps will become clearer soon."
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Nate said: "Just make sure you don't quit - the path forward will show up soon. You got this!"
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Joanna said: "Appreciated! I think just having someone to support me throughout the whole process is such a blessing. It gives me the motivation to keep pushing forward."
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Nate said: "Glad to hear my support makes a difference, Joanna. I'm here for you!"
[6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022] Joanna said: "Always good to hear! See you later!"
[1:43 pm on 24 March, 2022] Nate said: "Hey Joanna! Long time no talk, how's it going? Crazy stuff's been happening since we last chatted."
[1:43 pm on 24 March, 2022] Joanna said: "Hey Nate! Been quite a ride - in a good way - had an audition yesterday for a writing gig."
[1:43 pm on 24 March, 2022] Nate said: "Congrats! How did it go? Are you excited?"
[1:43 pm on 24 March, 2022] Joanna said: "Thanks, Nate! It went alright. Mixed emotions - definitely excited but also a bit anxious. Keep those fingers crossed!"
[1:43 pm on 24 March, 2022] Nate said: "Yeah, I get it. Mixed emotions are rough, but I have faith in you! Keep me posted - you got this!"
[1:43 pm on 24 March, 2022] Joanna said: "Thanks, Nate! Your support means a lot. I'll make sure to keep you updated. Anything new on your end?"
[1:43 pm on 24 March, 2022] Nate said: "Yeah actually - I'm currently participating in the video game tournament again and it's INTENSE! There's so much adrenaline flowing."
[1:43 pm on 24 March, 2022] Joanna said: "Best of luck in the tournament! It sounds like it would be difficult to go through so many days of intense gaming! This is my go-to place for writing inspiration. It helps me stay sharp and motivated."
[1:43 pm on 24 March, 2022] Nate said: "Wow, that's a lot of books. Do you have any advice for someone like me who wants to pursue writing?"
[1:43 pm on 24 March, 2022] Joanna said: "Definitely! Read lots and try out different genres. Build a solid understanding of literature. Don't be afraid to write and share, even if it's just with friends. Practicing and gathering feedback will make you better. Have faith in yourself and continue following your writing dreams - it's tough but worth it."
[1:43 pm on 24 March, 2022] Nate said: "Thanks, Joanna. Really appreciate your help and kind words. I'm going to keep working hard on it and see what happens. Good luck with your project, I'm sure it will turn out great!"
[1:43 pm on 24 March, 2022] Joanna said: "Thanks Nate! Appreciate your kind words and support. Let's keep going for our dreams and work hard. Catch you later!"
[1:43 pm on 24 March, 2022] Nate said: "Bye Joanna! Take care!"
```
